title: STAT+: HHS adviser hopes prior authorization reform happens in ‘double-digit months,’ not years
description: A top federal health official said he hopes the Trump administration’s efforts to whittle down the insurance industry’s use of prior authorizations will produce results “in double-digit months” instead of…
